## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's reboot strategy for HeyGen's SEO and content efforts to drive significant traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current non-brand traffic: 107k monthly clicks (20% growth since Oct); targeting 2X (214k) and 10X (1.07M) growth](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on tools pages, programmatic SEO, and content refreshes, aiming for 275k additional monthly clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Localization opportunity could drive 64-93% growth, targeting Spanish, Portuguese, German, and French initially](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Plans to integrate HeyGen's AI avatar technology into content presentation for increased engagement](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Topics

### Current Traffic and Growth Targets

  - [107k monthly non-brand clicks as of March 2025 (20% growth since October)](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [2X growth target: 214k clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [10X growth target: 1.07M clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Currently at 50% of 2X goal](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [Tools pages: 15k+ potential monthly clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: 50k potential monthly clicks](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Content refresh: 16k potential monthly clicks from 124 underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Focus on tools content (46% more clicks than editorial posts)](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Building content clusters around face swap, brand kit, AI avatars](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Incorporating comparisons, how-to guides, and listicle formats](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Localization Opportunity

  - [English searches driving more clicks from India (26k) than USA (2k)](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [V1 targets: Spanish, Portuguese, German, French (incl. Canada)](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Potential 64-93% growth (175k-206k additional monthly clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Leveraging new hire (Kirkland) with localization experience](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Automatic translation workflow for new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Content Enrichment with HeyGen Technology

  - [Integrate AI avatars to present content on relevant pages](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Experiment with video presenters for increased engagement](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Utilize existing YouTube videos within content](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Convert 159 YouTube videos into articles](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

### Implementation Timeline

  - [Week 1: Re-map strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Week 2: Develop localization and programmatic SEO workflows](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Ongoing: Launch new pages, refresh content (hundreds of pages)](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule API integration session with Kirkland, Nav, and GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Daniel to take ownership of SEO efforts as Nav shifts focus to enterprise sales and agency program](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [GrowthX to send strategy deck for HeyGen team review](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration on agency program and upcoming announcements](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Continue brainstorming and idea sharing for maximum growth impact](https://fathom.video/share/tMiJSWYvJ9keWGJ7uwceRNjQYEt_GGTx?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
